indicators.name: dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables are not suitable for computer work due to their height and lack of ergonomics for prolonged use.

indicators.name: chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs are designed for dining, not computer work, and lack ergonomic support for extended use.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting is insufficient for computer work, which requires task lighting to reduce eye strain.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to set up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of dining tables and chairs, along with low lighting, makes it unsuitable for focused work. There is no flat personal work surface available, which is crucial for ergonomic support and task illumination.
